title: rubus × subjectus
intro: Rubus × subjectus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a type of bramble plant that is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the purple raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and cancer. The health benefits of Rubus × subjectus include its ability to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health, while its extracts have been shown to have antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including jams, jellies, teas, and supplements, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
